description: Low top Baxter shoe from vans features is inspired by the classic bulcher style in its shape. The design details are Vans innovations that make this shoe a classic piece. An international skate shoe with masterclass design, this shoe is a fashion and sport must have!UpperLeather uppers Bulcher construction with reinforced eyerowVans fashion cupsoleTriple stitching on the toe capVanslite super-soft molded and contoured EVA sock liner Central lacing systemInternal elastic tongue staysPadded tongue and collar for instep comfortMidsoleDie cut EVA midsoleOutsoleSBR rubber outsole with Vans' WaffleGrip patterning and a suction point for the big toe regionShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
